61.reason: [Memory leak: the node being popped (q->next before assignment) is not freed. Also, after this, the popped node is lost and cannot be freed later.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Memory leak: the node being popped (q->next before assignment) is not freed. Also, after this, the popped node is lost and cannot be freed later.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [Memory leak: the node being popped is not freed, and 'q' is not used to free it. Also, after updating 'p', the old tail node is lost without being freed.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [Memory leak: the node being popped (q->next before assignment) is not freed. Also, after this, the popped node is lost and cannot be freed later.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [Memory leak: the node being popped (original p) is not freed, and q is assigned but never freed or used correctly. Also, after updating p, the old tail node is lost without being freed.]
